_comment: Ninj-OS Proxie Edge Fabric v7.3.13, developed with reference to ProxyPass by SculkCatalystMC, with staged checksum-capable runtime installation
name: Ninj-OS Proxie - Universal Bedrock Edge v7.3.13
author: Ninj-OS
description: Universal Ninj-OS Bedrock proxy with Transparent Auth Mode for online-mode=true backends, Full Proxy Mode with signed identity forwarding for online-mode=false backends, Endstone and vanilla BDS adapters, multi-server dashboard, transport protection, Linux/Windows host agents, first-run owner setup, staged runtime installation, and SHA-256 verification. Developed with reference to ProxyPass by SculkCatalystMC.

installation.script:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -Eeuo pipefail
cd /mnt/server

cat > start.sh <<'NINJOS_BOOTSTRAP'
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -Eeuo pipefail
cd /home/container

readonly EXPECTED_VERSION="7.3.13"
readonly EXPECTED_ARCHIVE="NinjOS-Proxie-Edge-Fabric-v7.3.13-Runtime.tar.gz"
readonly VERSION_MARKER=".ninjos-edge-fabric-runtime"

log() { printf '[Ninj-OS Proxie Installer] %s\n' "$*"; }
fail() { printf '[Ninj-OS Proxie Installer] ERROR: %s\n' "$*" >&2; exit 1; }

installed_version() {
    [[ -f "${VERSION_MARKER}" ]] || return 0
    awk -F= '$1 == "version" { print $2; exit }' "${VERSION_MARKER}" 2>/dev/null || true
}

runtime_complete() {
    [[ -x ./NinjOSEdge && -x ./NinjOSDashboard && -x ./start-runtime.sh ]]
}

select_archive() {
    local requested="${RUNTIME_ARCHIVE:-}"
    if [[ -n "${requested}" && -f "${requested}" ]]; then
        printf '%s' "${requested}"
        return 0
    fi
    if [[ -f "${EXPECTED_ARCHIVE}" ]]; then
        printf '%s' "${EXPECTED_ARCHIVE}"
        return 0
    fi
    local discovered
    discovered="$(find . -maxdepth 1 -type f -name 'NinjOS-Proxie-Edge-Fabric-v*-Runtime.tar.gz' -printf '%T@ %f\n' 2>/dev/null | sort -nr | awk 'NR==1 {print $2}')"
    [[ -n "${discovered}" ]] || return 1
    printf '%s' "${discovered}"
}

expected_digest() {
    local archive="$1"
    if [[ -n "${RUNTIME_SHA256:-}" ]]; then
        printf '%s' "${RUNTIME_SHA256}" | tr 'A-F' 'a-f' | tr -d '[:space:]'
        return 0
    fi
    if [[ -s "${archive}.sha256" ]]; then
        awk 'NR==1 {print tolower($1)}' "${archive}.sha256"
        return 0
    fi
    return 1
}

verify_archive() {
    local archive="$1" digest actual
    if digest="$(expected_digest "${archive}")"; then
        [[ "${digest}" =~ ^[0-9a-f]{64}$ ]] || fail "Configured SHA-256 value is not a 64-character hexadecimal digest."
        actual="$(sha256sum "${archive}" | awk '{print tolower($1)}')"
        [[ "${actual}" == "${digest}" ]] || fail "Runtime archive checksum mismatch. Expected ${digest}; received ${actual}."
        log "SHA-256 verified for ${archive}."
    else
        log "No SHA-256 value supplied. Continuing after archive structure validation."
    fi
}

install_runtime() {
    local archive="$1" stage marker_tmp
    verify_archive "${archive}"
    stage="$(mktemp -d .ninjos-runtime-stage.XXXXXX)"
    trap 'rm -rf "${stage:-}"' RETURN

    log "Staging runtime v${EXPECTED_VERSION} from ${archive}."
    tar -xzf "${archive}" -C "${stage}"

    [[ ! -e "${stage}/config" && ! -e "${stage}/runtime" ]] || fail "Runtime archive contains persistent data directories and was rejected."
    for required in NinjOSEdge NinjOSDashboard start-runtime.sh ninjos-dashboard-account.sh manifest.json; do
        [[ -f "${stage}/${required}" ]] || fail "Runtime archive is missing ${required}."
    done
    chmod +x "${stage}/NinjOSEdge" "${stage}/NinjOSDashboard" "${stage}/start-runtime.sh" "${stage}/ninjos-dashboard-account.sh"

    cp -a "${stage}/." /home/container/
    chmod +x ./NinjOSEdge ./NinjOSDashboard ./start-runtime.sh ./ninjos-dashboard-account.sh

    marker_tmp="${VERSION_MARKER}.tmp"
    printf 'version=%s\ninstalled_at=%s\narchive=%s\nsha256=%s\n' \
        "${EXPECTED_VERSION}" "$(date -u +%FT%TZ)" "${archive}" \
        "$(sha256sum "${archive}" | awk '{print $1}')" > "${marker_tmp}"
    mv -f "${marker_tmp}" "${VERSION_MARKER}"
    sync
    rm -rf "${stage}"
    trap - RETURN
    log "Runtime v${EXPECTED_VERSION} installed successfully."
}

log "Bootstrap v${EXPECTED_VERSION} validating the local runtime."
current="$(installed_version)"
needs_install=0
if [[ "${FORCE_RUNTIME_INSTALL:-0}" == "1" ]]; then
    log "Forced runtime installation requested."
    needs_install=1
elif ! runtime_complete; then
    log "Runtime files are missing or incomplete."
    needs_install=1
elif [[ "${current}" != "${EXPECTED_VERSION}" ]]; then
    log "Installed marker is ${current:-unknown}; expected ${EXPECTED_VERSION}."
    needs_install=1
fi

if [[ "${needs_install}" == "1" ]]; then
    archive="$(select_archive)" || fail "No runtime archive found. Upload ${EXPECTED_ARCHIVE} and its optional .sha256 sidecar to the server root."
    install_runtime "${archive}"
else
    log "Runtime v${EXPECTED_VERSION} is current."
fi

exec ./start-runtime.sh
NINJOS_BOOTSTRAP
chmod +x start.sh

cat > INSTALL_RUNTIME_REQUIRED.txt <<'NINJOS_NOTICE'
Ninj-OS Proxie Edge Fabric v7.3.13 bootstrap installed.

Upload these deployment files to the server root:
  NinjOS-Proxie-Edge-Fabric-v7.3.13-Runtime.tar.gz
  NinjOS-Proxie-Edge-Fabric-v7.3.13-Runtime.tar.gz.sha256

The checksum sidecar is recommended. Start the server after upload. The bootstrap
stages and validates the runtime before installation and preserves config/ and
runtime/ because neither directory is included in the release archive.

On first startup, a single-use owner setup code is printed in the console and
saved temporarily in runtime/FIRST_RUN_SETUP.txt. Open the dashboard to choose
the permanent owner username and password.
NINJOS_NOTICE

printf '[Ninj-OS Proxie Installer] Bootstrap v7.3.13 installed.
'
printf '[Ninj-OS Proxie Installer] Upload NinjOS-Proxie-Edge-Fabric-v7.3.13-Runtime.tar.gz before first start.
'

variables.name: Runtime Archive
variables.description: Matching v7 runtime archive. Leave unchanged unless rolling back to a specifically named archive.

variables.name: Runtime SHA-256
variables.description: Optional 64-character SHA-256 digest. Leave empty when using the uploaded .sha256 sidecar file.

variables.name: First-Run Setup Code (optional)
variables.description: Optional fixed single-use code for claiming a fresh dashboard. Leave empty to generate a secure code automatically. The code is printed in the console and deleted after owner setup.

variables.name: Legacy Owner Token (v7.0.x upgrades only)
variables.description: Compatibility value for an existing v7.0.x token-based owner account. Fresh v7.3.13 installations should leave this empty and use the browser setup wizard.

variables.name: Dashboard Recovery Token
variables.description: Emergency password-reset override. Set a private value of at least 16 characters, restart, sign in with username 'recovery' and this value as the password, replace the owner login in Owner Account, then clear this variable and restart.

variables.name: Default Companion Secret
variables.description: Required HMAC secret shared with companions unless a backend has its own secret. This initial key can be rotated later from the dashboard Secret Vault.

variables.name: Metrics Token
variables.description: Optional bearer token for /metrics. Owner token is used when empty.

variables.name: Dashboard Owner TOTP Secret
variables.description: Optional Base32 TOTP secret. Leave empty until an authenticator is configured.

variables.name: Kingdom Companion Secret
variables.description: Optional Kingdom-specific HMAC secret. Shared companion secret is used when empty.

variables.name: Zoo Companion Secret
variables.description: Optional Zoo-specific HMAC secret. Shared companion secret is used when empty.

variables.name: Discord Webhook URL
variables.description: Optional Discord webhook for network events.

variables.name: Discord Bot Token
variables.description: Optional Discord bot token. Use with Discord Channel ID.

variables.name: Discord Channel ID
variables.description: Optional Discord channel used with the bot token.

variables.name: Force Runtime Install
variables.description: Set to 1 for one startup to restage and reinstall the selected runtime, then return it to 0.

variables.name: Session Core Internal Token
variables.description: Optional internal dashboard-to-session-core token. Leave empty to generate and persist one automatically.

variables.name: Lobby Bridge Secret
variables.description: Optional unique Endstone or vanilla bridge secret for the lobby example backend.

variables.name: Vanilla Agent Token
variables.description: Optional token used by a vanilla host agent.
